items.headline: subagent fixes land in Claude Code 2.1.181
items.body: claude code 2.1.181 ships subagent reliability fixes: nested chain depth limits, thinking duration accuracy, and subagent transcript viewing. there's also a new `/config key=value` syntax for setting runtime options without editing files. both matter for the portfolio agent system — scout and reviewer run as subagents inside Claude Code on every scheduled workflow run.
